subject: Audit data integrity in Step 1 (Load & Aggregate)
description: Read pre_csd_1_load_and_aggregate.py. Verify: (a) Missing value handling (4.3% in weighted_dist — is it preserved or filled?). (b) Schema validation (all expected columns present?). (c) Aggregation logic (sum for sales, mean for weighted_dist, etc.). (d) Output shape matches expectations (4,040 rows × 8 cols). Output: step1_audit.md with actual code + findings.
activeForm: Auditing Step 1 data loading and aggregation
